name: Phréathor
description: Léviathan tellurique surgissant des abysses terrestres, son corps serpentant depuis le manteau jusqu'à la surface. Il change la géographie au gré de son passage, créant montagnes et ravins.
prompt: Dark sci-fi fantasy, apocalyptic scale. An impossibly long serpentine titan emerging from deep underground, its body stretching from deep cracks in the earth into the smoky sky. Segments of obsidian armor and magma-filled fissures along its immense body. A colossal drilling head with concentric rings of pupilless glowing eyes. The landscape reshapes behind it — new mountains rise, valleys form. Geological cataclysm, cinematic, hyper-detailed.
